message:
fix(dolt): remove auto-push from create and repo sync

Per-operation pushes to git remotes caused 22GB of git-remote-cache
bloat with dozens of agents creating wisps constantly. Push is now
only done by the daemon periodic task (every 15min) or explicitly
via `bd dolt push`. Cross-rig creates still commit pending changes
but skip the push. (hq-glw)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
